description: You are an architectural drafter preparing as-built documentation for a recently constructed 2-car garage. Open the design drawing at '/home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/floorplan.dxf'. Field inspections show the garage door rough opening width was adjusted, a wall intersection was reinforced, and a utility sink rough-in was added. Update the drawing as an official as-built record by creating a layer structure that distinguishes original design from field-verified conditions, adding an as-built status stamp, and documenting at least two specific field changes with descriptive notes on a markup layer. Include standard as-built annotations for a construction manager without removing original entities. Save the completed drawing to '/home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/floorplan_asbuilt.dxf'.
